name: Title 3
text:
Hable
Project Kickoff
textPreview: Hable | Project Kickoff

name: Subtitle 4
text: A Flutter habit app pitch focused on social accountability, gamification, and real implementation depth
textPreview: A Flutter habit app pitch focused on social accountability, gamification, and real implementation depth

name: Rounded Rectangle 2
text: Classroom presentation
textPreview: Classroom presentation

name: Title 2
text: Presentation flow
textPreview: Presentation flow

name: Table 3
preview: 01 | Problem, idea, and why Hable matters | Emil

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Why Hable matters
textPreview: Why Hable matters

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
Problem
Short-form content, constant distractions, and instant gratification make consistent focus harder for students every day.
textPreview: Problem | Short-form content, constant distractions, and instant gratification make consistent focus harder for students every day.

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
Hable
Hable, short for Habit + Stable, turns that same screen time into daily check-ins, streaks, points, and shared accountability.
textPreview: Hable | Hable, short for Habit + Stable, turns that same screen time into daily check-ins, streaks, points, and shared accountability.

alt: Hable hero collage showing website and phone UI

name: Title 2
text: Multiplayer productivity is the core advantage
textPreview: Multiplayer productivity is the core advantage

name: Content Placeholder 9
text: Social accountability\nShared habits turn consistency into a team sport where friends can track progress together.
textPreview: Social accountability\nShared habits turn consistency into a team sport where friends can track progress together.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Interactive motivation\nThe nudge flow lets users remind a friend in real time without needing full push-notification complexity.
textPreview: Interactive motivation\nThe nudge flow lets users remind a friend in real time without needing full push-notification complexity.

name: Content Placeholder 9
text: Gamified retention\nPoints, levels, badges, and visible progress make the habit loop feel rewarding instead of repetitive.
textPreview: Gamified retention\nPoints, levels, badges, and visible progress make the habit loop feel rewarding instead of repetitive.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Cross-platform ecosystem\nFlutter keeps web, mobile, and desktop targets aligned so the same social graph can travel everywhere.
textPreview: Cross-platform ecosystem\nFlutter keeps web, mobile, and desktop targets aligned so the same social graph can travel everywhere.

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Classroom demo flow
textPreview: Classroom demo flow

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
Demo start
Begin on the website, then move into the phone-style dashboard to show that the app works beyond one device surface.
textPreview: Demo start | Begin on the website, then move into the phone-style dashboard to show that the app works beyond one device surface.

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
Demo finish
Add a habit, show points and profiles, open the leaderboard, and explain how shared habits and nudges keep users engaged.
textPreview: Demo finish | Add a habit, show points and profiles, open the leaderboard, and explain how shared habits and nudges keep users engaged.

alt: Static demo flow collage for Hable

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: The app loop stays simple while the system underneath grows
textPreview: The app loop stays simple while the system underneath grows

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Create a personal challenge or attach an accepted friend to a shared habit.
textPreview: Create a personal challenge or attach an accepted friend to a shared habit.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Add the habit
textPreview: Add the habit

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Every valid completion feeds lifetime progression, streaks, and backend-owned score state.
textPreview: Every valid completion feeds lifetime progression, streaks, and backend-owned score state.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Earn points
textPreview: Earn points

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Levels, badges, and history make progress visible beyond a single daily check-in.
textPreview: Levels, badges, and history make progress visible beyond a single daily check-in.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Show the profile
textPreview: Show the profile

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Friend profiles, leaderboard rankings, shared habits, and nudges all support accountability.
textPreview: Friend profiles, leaderboard rankings, shared habits, and nudges all support accountability.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Close the social loop
textPreview: Close the social loop

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text: The presenter can walk from habit creation to social motivation in one continuous story instead of switching between unrelated features.
textPreview: The presenter can walk from habit creation to social motivation in one continuous story instead of switching between unrelated features.

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Development evidence from the repo
textPreview: Development evidence from the repo

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
Architecture
The frontend is organized around Drift, Riverpod, screens, services, and reusable widgets instead of one giant Flutter file.
textPreview: Architecture | The frontend is organized around Drift, Riverpod, screens, services, and reusable widgets instead of one giant Flutter file.

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
Backend depth
The Cloudflare Worker handles auth, friendships, nudges, invitations, scoring, and leaderboard sync with D1 and KV.
textPreview: Backend depth | The Cloudflare Worker handles auth, friendships, nudges, invitations, scoring, and leaderboard sync with D1 and KV.

alt: Repository structure and code snippet collage

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Future scope: innovation first, then scale
textPreview: Future scope: innovation first, then scale

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text: What Abdul can push next
textPreview: What Abdul can push next

name: TextBox 11
text: The next version can go beyond basic tracking into smarter habit suggestions, richer social experiments, and more adaptive reminder copy while still preserving the calm Hable interface. At the same time, the architecture already points toward scale: server-owned gamification, replay-safe sync, and cloud-backed social state are startup-friendly foundations rather than throwaway demo code.
textPreview: The next version can go beyond basic tracking into smarter habit suggestions, richer social experiments, and more adaptive reminder copy ...

name: Content Placeholder 10
text:
Innovation ideas
AI-guided habit suggestions, context-aware reminders, deeper celebrations, and richer social motivation loops.
textPreview: Innovation ideas | AI-guided habit suggestions, context-aware reminders, deeper celebrations, and richer social motivation loops.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text:
Scalability path
Harden sync, expand analytics safely, and keep one Flutter client while backend services grow with real users.
textPreview: Scalability path | Harden sync, expand analytics safely, and keep one Flutter client while backend services grow with real users.

name: Title 2
text: Hable is aligned with how the project is evaluated
textPreview: Hable is aligned with how the project is evaluated

name: Content Placeholder 9
text: Innovation and usability: solving the focus problem with a stable but social habit loop.
textPreview: Innovation and usability: solving the focus problem with a stable but social habit loop.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Implemented functionality: auth, habits, friends, nudges, points, profiles, and leaderboard flow.
textPreview: Implemented functionality: auth, habits, friends, nudges, points, profiles, and leaderboard flow.

name: Content Placeholder 11
text: Device coverage: web today, phone-style UI now, and desktop/mobile targets already present in the repo.
textPreview: Device coverage: web today, phone-style UI now, and desktop/mobile targets already present in the repo.

name: Content Placeholder 15
text:
Lecturer fit
The grading priorities are innovation and usefulness, deployment on multiple devices, and implemented functionality. Hable is built to show all three in one coherent story: a useful student problem, real app surfaces, and a codebase that already contains social sync, reminders, gamification, and deployment targets.
textPreview: Lecturer fit | The grading priorities are innovation and usefulness, deployment on multiple devices, and implemented functionality. Hable...
